title: SURVIVAL TÉCNICO
description: Explore Survival Técnico! This modpack boosts your Minecraft survival with optimization mods for smoother gameplay. Ideal for efficiency and performance enthusiasts. Embark on your adventure with Survival Técnico!
body:
## SURVIVAL TÉCNICO

This is the official Modpack of Survival Técnico!

## What is this Modpack for?

Are you looking for a good Vanilla+ modpack that not only boosts your performance but also improves your experience on Survival servers?

This modpack makes everything feel just a little bit better.

With the ability to fully customize your game to change its look and improve your FPS, you can take care of your PC and finally play smoother.

And with the cool tweaks that make many things easier, things like crafting and exploring are even more fun!
